codeReview.summary: The mem-deprecation feature implements memory deprecation with confidence threshold checking at 0.3 and superseded_by links. The implementation is well-structured with 17 passing unit tests covering all scenarios.

summary: Pass - The deprecation module provides correct functionality for marking memories with confidence <0.3 as deprecated with superseded_by links. All 17 unit tests pass, build succeeds with no warnings, and all verification steps completed successfully.
